title: Epitaph.
content:
Here brewer Gabriel's fire's extinct,
            And empty all his barrels:
        He's blest, if, as he brew'd, he drink,
            In upright virtuous morals.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Burns delivers a powerful performance in "Epitaph."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
